mission.title: helm: Trigger hook-delete-policy after log retrieval for helm test
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:

Closes #9098 **Helm test --logs fails with hook-delete-policy "hook-failed" or "hook-succeed"**

If we want to run `helm test --logs`, this results in an error like:
````
$ helm --namespace test validation --logs
NAME: validation
LAST DEPLOYED: Sat Jan 22 22:43:19 2022
NAMESPACE: test
STATUS: deployed
REVISION: 2
TEST SUITE:     test-secrets-store
Last Started:   Sat Jan 22 22:43:25 2022
Last Completed: Sat Jan 22 22:43:27 2022
Phase:          Succeeded

Error: unable to get pod logs for test-secrets-store: pods "test-secrets-store" not found
````

When calling `helm test`, the following functions are called in the code:
1. `helm test` results in a call of `newReleaseTestCmd()` in `helm\release_testing.go`
2. `newReleaseTestCmd()` results in a call of `Run(args[0])`  in `action\release_testing.go`
3. `Run(args[0])` results in a call of `execHook(rel, release.HookTest, r.Timeout)` in `hooks.go`
4.  `execHook(rel, release.HookTest, r.Timeout)` res

resolution.summary:
## WHAT

Adding [Hook deletion policies](https://helm.sh/docs/topics/charts_hooks/#hook-deletion-policies) for the Helm tests.

## WHY

When running tests with Helm the pods will not be tidied up.
When the annotation `"helm.sh/hook-delete-policy": hook-succeeded` is added, after a successful run the pod will be deleted afterwards.
If the pod fails it will still be present.

Also the value `before-hook-creation` was added to be able to run the test again if it failed without manually deleting the pod.

<hr />

Marco Lecheler [marco.lecheler@mercedes-benz.com](mailto:marco.lecheler@mercedes-benz.com) Mercedes-Benz Tech Innovation GmbH ([ProviderInformation](https://github.com/mercedes-benz/foss/blob/master/PROVIDER_INFORMATION.md))
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request

LAST DEPLOYED: Sat Jan 22 22:43:19 2022
NAMESPACE: test
STATUS: deployed
REVISION: 2
TEST SUITE:     test-secrets-store
Last Started:   Sat Jan 22 22:43:25 2022
Last Completed: Sat Jan 22 22:43:27 2022
Phase:          Succeeded

Error: unable to get pod logs for test-secrets-store: pods "test-secrets-store" not found
